name: transaction-list
title: Transaction List
author: Parable
description: A dashboard transaction-list block: colour-seeded initial discs, mono reference ids, tabular-nums amounts (negative red-ish / positive green-ish), and dotted completed/pending/failed status chips. Rows stagger-fade-in on mount with a spring and raise their background on hover; under reduced motion the stagger is dropped, rows render instantly, and the pending dot stops pulsing.
